content.query:
SELECT DISTINCT(COUNT(Move_Primary_key)), sum(Worktime_Seconds)/3600
 FROM [dbo].[rtg_lane_workhours]
 where move_date = '02-02-2026'


SELECT DISTINCT(COUNT(Move_Primary_key))
 FROM [dbo].[rtg_session_moves]
 where move_date = '02-02-2026'

SELECT sum(Worktime_Seconds)/3600
 FROM [dbo].[rtg_session_workhours]
 where move_date = '02-02-2026'

SELECT sum([Total_Moves]), sum(Total_Work_Seconds)/3600
 FROM [dbo].[rtg_lane_productivity]
 where move_date = '02-02-2026'

SELECT sum([Total_Moves]), sum(Total_Work_Seconds)/3600
 FROM [dbo].[rtg_session_productivity]
 where move_date = '02-02-2026'
